text:
In the first scene, the hallway feels cold, quiet, and almost clinical—there is an emptiness that makes me hyper aware of my own presence. The stark angles and white light amplify a sense of anticipation, perhaps even unease.

In the second scene, color and text draw me in, invoking curiosity and engagement. The vibrant wall invites contemplation about innovation and connection, making me feel more lively and intellectually stimulated here than in the hallway. It is a transition from solitude into an active realm of ideas.
